---
title: "MI401"
author: "Rafael Santos"
lang: pt-BR
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    documentclass: article
    geometry:
      - margin=1in
    fontsize: 11pt
    colorlinks: true
---

{{< include 1_fundamentos_probabilidade.qmd >}}
{{< include 2_variaveis_aleatorias.qmd >}}
